parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed Unicode escape sequences (e.g., \u221a\u00fc -> groß, \u221a\u00a7 -> Anfang, \u221a\u00bar -> Würmern). 2. Corrected inconsistent tag <PRICE> to <PRIZE> for uniformity. 3. Fixed malformed <FORMAT> tags (e.g., 8v\u221a\u2264. -> 8vo.). 4. Added missing closing </BIBL> tag for the nested <BIBL> inside the last entry. 5. Removed stray \u221a\u2020 characters (non-breaking spaces or similar). 6. Ensured all <BIBL> tags are properly nested and closed. 7. Standardized formatting for consistency (e.g., 8vo. instead of mixed representations).
